case_title: ADON REYNOLDS VS. HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, ADON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ADON REYNOLDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, INCATIONAL ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHENG-YU LEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2024 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, ADON AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED***

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYNOLDS, ADON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY REYNOLDS, ADON AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY REYNOLDS, ADON HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION
